snippet.title: IMPRESIVNO sa RR - BAKA PRASE : TERETE ME JER SAM MNOGO JAKA GLAVA!
snippet.description:
Od 16. marta, svakog utorka na mom yt kanalu u 19h gledacete novu epizodu IMPRESIVNO sa Ruzom Rupic. Ugosticu mnoge javne licnosti iz raznih sfera javnog zivota koje cete upoznati u potpuno drugacijem svetlu. Pricacemo o njihovim karijerama, pocecima, sta im je bilo najteze, a sta najlakse u njihovom putu i pevacemo! Pomoc cu imati od mog producenta Pavla Radulovica. Danas mi je u gostima Bogdan Ilic, poznatiji kao, Baka Prase! Kako je poceo da snima, kakve probleme donosi popularnost, o dramama i hapsenju, pricace sa mnom u danasnjoj epizodi!
Nadam se da ce vam se dopasti celokupan projekat, a mi se vidimo svakog utorka od 19h.

Pavlezi: https://www.instagram.com/pavlezi.mp3/

snippet.title: Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)
snippet.description:
Dua Lipa - Levitating ft. @DaBaby / Don't Start Now (Live at the GRAMMYs 2021)

Get the album Future Nostalgia : https://dualipa.co/futurenostalgiaвАЛвАЛ

Subscribe to the Dua Lipa channel for all the best and latest official music videos, behind the scenes and live performances. 
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC-J-вАЛвАЛ...

See more official videos from Dua Lipa here:
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Listen to more from the album 'Future Nostalgia' :
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?listвАЛвАЛ...

Follow Dua Lipa:
Instagram:  https://dualipa.co/instagramвАЛвАЛ
Facebook: http://dualipa.co/facebookвАЛвАЛ
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@dualipaofficialвАЛвАЛ
Twitter: http://dualipa.co/twitterвАЛвАЛ
YouTube: https://dualipa.co/youtubeвАЛвАЛ

About Dua Lipa:
Born and raised in London to Kosovar-Albanian parents Dua Lipa signed to Warner Records in 2015, releasing her self titled debut in 2017 which featured the hit singles, 'Be The One', 'IDGAF', 'Hotter Than Hell' & her first UK #1 hit 'New Rules'. 

Critical success soon followed as Dua Lipa picked up Brit Awards for 'Best Female Solo Artist' and 'Best British Breakthrough Act' as well as Grammy Awards for 'Best New Artist' and 'Best Dance Recording' for the track 'Electricity' in collaboration with Silk City.

Her second internationally acclaimed studio album 'Future Nostalgia' was released in 2020 and included the hit singles 'Don't Start Now, 'Break My Heart', 'Hallucinate' and 'Levitating', with the remix album 'Club Future Nostalgia' following shortly after featuring guest appearances from 'Blackpink', 'Missy Elliott', 'Madonna' and 'Gwen Stefani'.

#DuaLipaвАЛ #FutureNostalgiaвАЛ #Grammys

snippet.title: Joe Biden stumbles on steps of Air Force One
snippet.description:
The US president stumbled while boarding Air Force One on his way to visit to Atlanta, Georgia, to meet with Asian American community leaders. Biden tripped on the steps up to the plane, before recovering and carrying on unaided, turning to salute at the top. The 78-year-old fractured his right foot in November 2020 while playing with his dog Major

snippet.title: Sta Bi Se Desilo Kad Bi Svi Prdnuli U isto Vreme ?
snippet.description:
Ko ne lajkuje video nije dobar covek рЯШБ

Svi smo nekad u zivotu prdnuli, nekad pustimo one stidljive gasove koje niko ne primeti, nekad one sto smrde, nekad one glasne, a nekad uz neke od njih ide i iznenadjenje. Ali sta bi se desilo kad bi u isto vreme, svi ljudi na planeti, bez imalo stida, prdnuli. Da li bi to uticalo na kvalitet vazduha ? Koliko bi se osecalo ? I sta bi jedna sibica mogla da uradi, hajmo da saznamo.

Podrzite nas na Patreonu: https://bit.ly/2DY7fn3
Mail za Saradnju/Business email: BojanZlatarevic@gmail.com

snippet.title: PraviƒЗete ih stalno! Miri≈°u do kom≈°ija. Banana keksiƒЗi za post na vodi, tako mekani i ukusni.
snippet.description:
HIT keksiƒЗi kod mene u kuƒЗi. UkuƒЗani stalno tra≈Њe da im pravim. Mogu da stoje par dana, u kutiji kao i svi drugi keksi. U≈Њivajte!
#posnireceptinavodi #posnikolaci #banane
bez ulja
bez jaja bez mleka
sa bananama
serpica recepti

Recept na blogu:
http://www.serpica.net/2021/03/banana-keksici-post-na-vodi.html

Sastojci:
- 300 gr. bra≈°na
- 2 banane
- 3 ka≈°ike d≈Њema
- 100 gr. ≈°eƒЗera u prahu
- vanila
- limunova korica
- prstohvat soli
- 10 gr. pra≈°ka za pecivo

Za premaz:
- 1 ka≈°ika d≈Њema
- 2 ka≈°ike vode

*200 stepeni oko 20 minuta

 ENG:
Ingredients:
- 300 gr. flour
- 2 bananas
- 3 tablespoons of jam
- 100 gr. powdered sugar
- vanilla
- lemon zest
- pinch of salt
- 10 gr. baking powder

For coating:
- 1 tablespoon of jam
- 2 tablespoons of water

* 200 degrees for about 20 minutes

snippet.title: Panathinaikos OPAP Athens - Crvena Zvezda mts Belgrade Highlights | EuroLeague, RS Round 30
snippet.description:
Crvena Zvezda MTS Belgrade took a hard-fought victory from OAKA after beating Panathinaikos OPAP Athens 82-86 on Friday night. 



ABOUT EUROLEAGUE BASKETBALL 
Euroleague Basketball (EB) is a global leader in the sports and entertainment business, devoted to running the top European competitions of professional basketball clubs under a unique and innovative organizational model. Owned and administered by some of the most successful and historic clubs in the world, EB manages and organizes the continentвАЩs two premier menвАЩs basketball competitions, the Turkish Airlines EuroLeague and the 7DAYS EuroCup, as well as the sportвАЩs premier under-18 showcase, the EB Adidas Next Generation Tournament. 
The EB competitions bring the elite of European basketball to all five continents and to the entire sports community through the OTT platform EuroLeague TV. EB also organizes a series of community and educational programs. Its ground-breaking corporate social responsibility program One Team features all EB clubs that have already made a difference in the lives of over 22,000 participants. Its Sports Business MBA trains future professionals in sports management. 
About One Team 
One Team, Euroleague Basketball's corporate social responsibility (CSR) program, supported by Turkish Airlines as the One Team Founding Patron and with the collaboration of Special Olympics as Proud Partner, uses basketball to achieve real social impact in our communities. With an innovative model of interconnectedness across an entire continent, Euroleague Basketball and its clubs have developed a complete CSR program that brings together activities from each team in an integrated, impactful way, working under the theme of "community integration". Each participating club develops a specific One Team project tailored to its own community needs to benefit groups in danger of exclusion due to problems such as substance abuse and gender, physical or intellectual disability. Since its founding in 2012, the One Team program has reached already directly and indirectly more than 22,000 participants through its various team projects.

snippet.title: Lamborghini Urus v BMW X6M - DRAG RACE
snippet.description:

ItвАЩs Saturday morning, so you know what time it isвА¶ Time for another Mat vs Yianni showdown!! 

WeвАЩve got a BMW X6M Competition going up against a Lamborghini Urus (no prizes for guessing whoвАЩs in which car)! These two SUV heavyweights are going head-to-head over the quarter-mile, and when looking at stats alone, you might think itвАЩll be an easy win for the Urus! 

Under the LamboвАЩs bonnet, youвАЩll find a 4-litre twin-turbo V8 which can deliver 650hp and 850Nm. As for the BMW, it may pack a 4.4-litre twin-turbo V8, but it only puts down 625hp & 750Nm! But thatвАЩs not allвА¶ The Urus is also 200kg lighter than the X6M! 

Now, of course, we know the BMW has one trick up its sleeve - an EPIC launch system! The question is, will it be enough to snatch the win on this wet track? ThereвАЩs only one way to find outвА¶ LETвАЩS RACE!

snippet.title: CBC News: The National | Meghan and HarryвАЩs Oprah interview; Vaccine optimism | March 7, 2021
snippet.description:
Prince Harry and Meghan sit down with Oprah for a revealing interview about leaving their roles as senior royals. The reasons to be optimistic about the vaccine rollout and the road ahead. Plus, the officer charged with killing George Floyd goes on trial.

snippet.title: Emanet 143. B√ґl√Љm | Legacy Episode 143
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his fatherвАЩs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephewвА¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncleвАЩs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the Kƒ±rƒ±mlƒ± mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#LimonAƒЯacƒ±

snippet.title: MEDICO - Mamma Mia (prod. by EnelBeatz)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM PROFILI:
Medico : https://www.instagram.com/whoismedico/

Music: Medico
Text: Medico
Arrangement: EnelBeatz, Arpino Sachi
Back vocal: Ma≈°a Sitarica
Mix & Master: Arpino Sachi


Video production: Vedad Mandra | xvedmanx
Directed by: Medico, Vedad Mandra
Script: Vedad Mandra, Medico
Camera: Vedad Mandra
CC VFX Post: Vedad Mandra
Costume: Emina Tsili

TEXT

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrti se sve dharma 
mama mia

ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x2


vers1
moje sve htjele bi bit
 jer na meni samo je lagerfeld karl e 
zelja joj htjela benz
 nije ni bitno ko sjedi sa strane

moli da voli brzo da boli
moli za gole sate
prolij pa dolij 
glumi mi dolly dobro ta zna sta radi

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugi il treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal

takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

bridge:
o mama mia mama
ko zmija zlu tom prija
uvijek zijan karma
sve vrati se sve dharma 
mama mia

 ref.
i ja toga svjestan sam necastan cin mi je
jastuk na nju mirise polijem viskijem x3


vers 2.
da li mislis na mene ko prije
prisjetis se probije ko noz
navijas ti za mene i lijek
tvoj sam jedini ja antidot

znas ti moje namjere ne nisu namjerne
ali vuce me na zlo
velike su razmjere izmedju zavjere
razlika je nebo tlo

meni ti nisi stipsa
jasno vidno je da tvoj tip sam
svaki drugil treci ti kiksa
sto bas ja da sam tvoj schicksal
takvih meni puna je lista
sklonim te ko potezom kista
u minuti raste mi ista
samo za noc dobra za vise nista

snippet.title: Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, opens up about her family
snippet.description:
For the first time Meghan, Duchess of Sussex, publicly discusses her father Thomas Markle and her half-sister's forthcoming tell-all book in this previously unaired clip from her and Prince Harry's sit-down with Oprah Winfrey. Watch Oprah's full primetime special with Meghan and Prince Harry here: https://bit.ly/3t24kAK

Subscribe to the "CBS This Morning" YouTube channel: https://bit.ly/3ceNNCX
Watch more "CBS This Morning": http://bit.ly/1T88yAR
Like "CBS This Morning" on Facebook: https://on.fb.me/1LhtdvI
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Instagram: https://bit.ly/1Q7NGnY
Follow "CBS This Morning" on Twitter: https://bit.ly/1Xj5W3p
Follow CBS News on Twitter: https://bit.ly/3bdNXek

Get the latest news and best in original reporting from CBS News delivered to your inbox. Sign up for newsletters: https://cbsn.ws/1RqHw7T

Get your news on the go! Download CBS News mobile apps for Android and iOS: https://cbsn.ws/1Xb1WC8

Get new episodes of shows you love across devices the next day, stream local news live, and watch full seasons of CBS fan favorites and originals anytime, anywhere with Paramount+. Sign up here: https://bit.ly/309gCe2

---
Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. Check local listings for "CBS This Morning" broadcast times.

Each weekday morning, "CBS This Morning" co-hosts Gayle King, Anthony Mason and Tony Dokoupil deliver two hours of original reporting, breaking news and top-level newsmaker interviews in an engaging and informative format that challenges the norm in network morning news programs. The broadcast has earned a prestigious Peabody Award, a Polk Award, four News & Documentary Emmys, three Daytime Emmys and the 2017 Edward R. Murrow Award for Best Newscast. The broadcast was also honored with an Alfred I. duPont-Columbia Award as part of CBS News division-wide coverage of the shootings at Sandy Hook Elementary School in Newtown, Connecticut. snippet.title: LIVE: GRAMMY Awards Premiere Ceremony | March 14 at 3pm ET / 12pm PT
snippet.description:
MusicвАЩs Biggest Night kicks off with the Premiere Ceremony, featuring 8 special performances and more than 70 GRAMMYs awarded across music genres ranging from classical and jazz to R&B, Global music and more. 

Hosted by current three-time GRAMMY nominee Jhen√© Aiko, the Premiere Ceremony will feature a number of performances by current GRAMMY nominees, including: Nigerian singer, songwriter and rapper Burna Boy, jazz band Terri Lyne Carrington + Social Science, blues musician Jimmy "Duck" Holmes, classical pianist Igor Levit, Latin electropop musician Lido Pimienta, singer, songwriter and performance artist Poppy, and singer, songwriter and composer Rufus Wainwright. 

Kicking off the event will be a tribute performance celebrating the 50th anniversary of the classic Marvin Gaye track "Mercy, Mercy Me (The Ecology)". The special all-nominee ensemble performance will feature Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra, Thana Alexa, John Beasley, Camilo, Regina Carter, Alexandre Desplat, Bebel Gilberto, Lupita Infante, Sarah Jarosz, Mykal Kilgore, Ledisi, Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez, PJ Morton, Gregory Porter, Grace Potter, s√§je, Gustavo Santaolalla (Bajofondo), Anoushka Shankar, and Kamasi Washington. 

All of the Premiere Ceremony performers and the host are nominated this year, as are most of the presenters. Afro-Peruvian Jazz Orchestra for Best Latin Jazz Album (Tradiciones); Aiko for Album Of The Year (Chilombo), Best R&B Performance ("Lightning & Thunder" featuring John Legend) and Best Progressive R&B Album (Chilombo); Alexa for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Ona); Beasley with Somi With Frankfurt Radio Big Band for Best Jazz Vocal Album (Holy Room: Live At Alte Oper), Best Large Jazz Ensemble Album (MONK'estra Plays John Beasley), Best Arrangement, Instrumental or A Cappella ("Donna Lee") and Best Arrangement, Instrumentals and Vocals ("Asas Fechadas" with Maria Mendes); Burna Boy for Best Global Music Album (Twice As Tall); Burr for Best Comedy Album (Paper Tiger); Camilo for Best Latin Pop or Urban Album (Por Primera Vez); Carrington + Social Science for Best Jazz Instrumental Album (Waiting Game); Carter for Best Improvised Jazz Solo ("Pachamama"); Chika for Best New Artist; Desplat for Best Instrumental Composition ("Plumfield"); Gilberto for Best Global Music Album (Agora); Holmes for Best Traditional Blues Album (Cypress Grove); Infante for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (La Serenata); Jarosz for Best American Roots Song ("Hometown"), Best Americana Album (World On The Ground); Kilgore for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Let Me Go"); Ledisi for Best Traditional R&B Performance ("Anything For You"); Levit for Best Classical Instrumental Solo (Beethoven: Complete Piano Sonatas); Mariachi Sol de Mexico de Jose Hernandez for Best Regional Mexican Music Album (Including Tejano) (Bailando Sones Y Huapangos Con Mariachi Sol De Mexico De Jose Hernandez); Morton for Best Gospel Album (Gospel According To PJ); Pimienta for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Miss Colombia); Poppy for Best Metal Performance ("BLOODMONEY"); Porter for Best R&B Album (All Rise); Potter for Best Rock Performance ("Daylight"), Best Rock Album (Daylight); s√§je for Best Arrangement, Instruments and Vocals ("Desert Song"); Santaolalla with Bajofondo for Best Latin Rock or Alternative Album (Aura); Shankar for Best Global Music Album (Love Letters); Wainwright for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album (Unfollow The Rules); and Washington for Best Score Soundtrack For Visual Media (Becoming).

snippet.title: BEZ USTRUƒМAVANJA - Dra≈Њa PetroviƒЗ: Vladimir Cvijan je negde ubijen, zabranjeno je da se o tome pi≈°e!
snippet.description:
U najnovijem izdanju emisije "Bez ustruƒНavanja" gost je bio glavni i odgovorni urednik dnevnog lista Danas Dragoljub Dra≈Њa PetroviƒЗ. Dra≈Њu PetroviƒЗa nije toliko iznenadila vest o smrti Vladimira Cvijana koliko ga je iznenadila ƒЗutnja medija kojima je zabranjeno da o toj vesti pi≈°u. On istiƒНe da mu je jo≈° pre tri godine kolega iz Srpskog telegrafa rekao da je Vladimir Cvijan ubijen, ali je ovo samo dokaz da postoji centar koji odluƒНuje koje vesti mogu, a koje vesti ne smeju da se objavljuju. PetroviƒЗ podseƒЗa da je tako bilo i kada je sin ≈љeljka MitroviƒЗ pregazio devojku na pe≈°aƒНkom prelazu kada je do njega stigla sms poruka koju je Suzana VasiljeviƒЗ, savetnica Aleksandra VuƒНiƒЗa, uputila uredniku jednog lista gde ga moli da ne bude grub prema mlaƒСem MitroviƒЗu. Vest da je kompanija United media kupila list Danas izazvala je brojne komentare, ali Dra≈Њa PetroviƒЗ tvrdi da ta transakcija neƒЗe uticati na ureƒСivaƒНku politiku lista. IstiƒНe da se nisu prodali ƒРilasu, veƒЗ ≈†olaku, ali da ƒЗe politika lista ostati nepromenjena. List Danas otvoren je za dijalog i polemiku i objavljuje tekstove predstavnika razliƒНitih politiƒНkih stavova zbog ƒНega je redakcija ƒНesto kritikovana ƒНak i od najvernijih ƒНitalaca. Poznati srpski pisac Svetislav Basara godinama je redovni kolumnista lista Danas, ali je na iznenaƒСenje svih pre≈°ao u tabloid Kurir. Glavni motiv prelaska po reƒНima Dra≈Њe PetroviƒЗa je bio visoki honorar. Kada je reƒН o re≈Њimskim medijima zanimljiv je mentalni sklop njihovih urednika, jer je Dra≈Њa PetroviƒЗ imao  interesantno iskustvo sa vlasnikom Pinka ≈љeljkom MitroviƒЗem koji je posle negativne kampanje protiv Danasa bez gri≈Њe savesti poku≈°ao da ostvari i privatni kontakt sa Dra≈Њom.
